item.title: US operator names new CFO months after previous executive’s departure
item.description: Expand Energy taps Parkland’s Marcel Teunissen to fill major role after Mohit Singh’s ‘termination without cause’

item.title: US to merge offshore regulators split by BP Deepwater Horizon disaster
item.description: Move would reintegrate law enforcement and industrial promotion, which were separated by Obama following worst oil spill in US history

item.title: Valaris secures $450 million contract extension for drillship offshore Brazil
item.description: New charter with Petrobras will commence in November 2027

item.title: Israel strikes petrochemical plant at Iran’s South Pars complex
item.description: Natural gas field was target of previous strikes in March

item.title: Petronas teams up with Valaris and Halliburton for Suriname projects
item.description: Agreement establishes collaborative framework across project's entire lifecycle

item.title: Brazilian driller wins $600 million rig contract extensions with Petrobras
item.description: Ventura Offshore to keep two rigs working for longer in Brazil

item.title: Attack on UAE’s largest gas facility leaves one dead, 'significant damages'
item.description: Adnoc Gas' Habshan complex in southwestern Abu Dhabi is one of the largest gas processing facilities in the world

item.title: Blaze on ONGC offshore platform injures at least 10
item.description: Mumbai High is India’s largest offshore oil and gas asset, delivering more than 25% of domestic oil output

item.title: India offers more exploration acreage, including ultra-deepwater blocks
item.description: Bid submissions for OALP-XI due on same date as previous round after that deadline postponed four times

item.title: Lion secures rig for game-changing offshore wildcat
item.description: ASX-listed operator plans in July to spud Bula Karang-1 well offshore Indonesia

item.title: Female 'one two' at UK supermajor BP
item.description: Carole Howle appointed deputy chief executive officer

item.title: TotalEnergies awaits judgement on South Africa exploration plan
item.description: Court hearing on drilling in Orange basin block wraps up in Western Cape

item.title: ENEOS Explora to FID Malaysia offshore gas project in 2027
item.description: Operator aims to accelerate development of BIGST Cluster

item.title: Petronas to FID Malaysia offshore gas project in 2027
item.description: Operator and partner ENEOS Xplora aim to accelerate development of BIGST Cluster

item.title: Oilfield contractor set to reincorporate in Texas
item.description: Weatherford follows ExxonMobil’s redomiciling move to centre of US energy industry

item.title: This week's leading oil and gas appointments
Groups sue Trump administration over exemptions for offshore drillers
item.description: Lawsuit says exempting oil companies in the US Gulf from the Endangered Species Act is illegal

item.title: ExxonMobil runs first Brazil oil transshipment after 110 years in country
item.description: Company received first oil cargo from Bacalhau pre-salt field

item.title: Northern Endeavour arrives at FPSO dismantling yard
item.description: About 95% of vessel will be recycled in Danish facility

item.title: Transocean adds $1 billion backlog with new contracts in Norway and Brazil
item.description: Company secures more work for one semi-submersible rig and two drillships

item.title: Iran war to dominate Q1 earnings as world fears long tail of disruption
item.description: Oil and gas price increases will reflect on upcoming first quarter results, but executives fear prolonged crisis will hit demand

item.title: Brazilian driller wins $1.1 billion rig contract extensions with Petrobras
item.description: New agreements will keep three drilling rigs working longer in Brazilian waters

item.title: BP hints at more US Gulf exploration
item.description: Senior vice president tells Upstream the UK supermajor has ‘some other wells in the works’ in the region

item.title: $5.6 billion East Africa oil line edges closer to completion
item.description: Uganda-Tanzania pipeline is four-firths complete

item.title: FPSO set to quit UK field for Falklands
item.description: Bluewater's Aoka Mizu FPSO is set to quit West of Shetland asset for redeployment to South Atlantic

item.title: TotalEnergies and Masdar to merge wind and solar operations
item.description: French supermajor and UAE green power group to create $2.2 billion joint venture in Asia

item.title: BP returns to Kazakhstan with new exploration deal
item.description: UK supermajor to partner KazMunayGaz in exploration of large block in promising oil and gas province

item.title: UK to host talks with 35 nations on Strait of Hormuz transits
item.description: US not part of discussions after Donald Trump warned of two to three weeks of continued bombing

item.title: Full scale of Strait of Hormuz traffic slump revealed after month of war
item.description: Chokepoint traffic remains depressed despite US efforts to paint a rosier picture of global trade

item.title: IEA, IMF and World Bank join forces in response to Middle East war
item.description: Coordination group will maximise institutions' response to energy and financial impacts of ongoing conflict
